title: Claude Code + MCP: Connecting External Tools to Your Agent
description: Learn how to configure MCP servers in Claude Code to give your agent access to external tools — filesystems, databases, APIs, and more.

resources.title: Claude Code MCP Documentation
resources.description: Official guide for adding and configuring MCP servers in Claude Code

resources.title: MCP Protocol Overview
resources.description: Understanding the Model Context Protocol — servers, clients, and tool schemas

resources.title: Add an MCP filesystem server to Claude Code
resources.description: Configure the MCP filesystem server and verify Claude Code can read and write files

resources.title: Claude Code MCP Integration Tutorial
resources.search_keyword: Claude Code MCP server connection tutorial 2026

quiz.question: Why would you connect an MCP server to Claude Code?
options: To give the agent access to external tools and data
quiz.explanation: MCP lets Claude Code connect to external systems like filesystems, databases, and tool servers.

quiz.question: Which example integration is used in this lesson?
quiz.explanation: The practice example adds a filesystem server so Claude Code can read and write project files.

quiz.question: What should you verify after adding an MCP server?
options: That the agent can actually use the connected tool
That all commands run without prompts
quiz.explanation: An MCP setup is only useful if the agent can successfully access and use the new tool.

evaluation.prompt: Paste your MCP setup output, command result, or error message here and AI will evaluate whether your Claude Code connection is working.
evaluation.context: This lesson teaches connecting a filesystem MCP server to Claude Code and verifying tool access.
successCriteria: Claude Code can see or use the filesystem tool
No unresolved permission or configuration errors remain
commonMistakes: Wrong project path passed to the filesystem server
Tool added but not tested with a real read or write action
Permissions or runtime errors ignored after setup

practicePrompts.label: Configure MCP Server
practicePrompts.instruction: Set up an MCP server in Claude Code.
practicePrompts.prompt: How do I configure an MCP server in Claude Code to connect to an external API?
practicePrompts.followUp: Try adding a new tool schema for a database connection.

practicePrompts.label: Test File Access
practicePrompts.prompt: What steps do I take to ensure Claude Code can read and write files in the MCP filesystem server?
practicePrompts.followUp: Attempt to create a new file and write data to it using the MCP server.

practicePrompts.label: Understand Tool Schemas
practicePrompts.prompt: Can you explain the role of tool schemas in the Model Context Protocol?
practicePrompts.followUp: Experiment by modifying a tool schema to include additional parameters.
